TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nate_Barnett, title = Nate_Barnett, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nate_Barnett} }

S.FORM: Nate Barnett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 2, Nate Barnett, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Nate Barnett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 2, Nate Barnett, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: nate βarnett s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, nate βarnett, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
